description_long: This bird features a striking blue plumage with a prominent, spiky crest atop its head and a long, broad wingspan. Its body is predominantly blue, with a white underbelly and a dark, sharply defined face mask. The tail is adorned with a vivid red, spiky cluster of feathers, creating a dramatic contrast to the rest of the body. The wings are wide and slightly scalloped, with individual feather segments clearly defined. The legs and feet are dark, slender, and talon-like, suitable for perching. The beak is short, straight, and conical, ideal for generalist feeding.
description: A blue bird with a spiky crest, broad wings, white underbelly, and a dramatic red spiky tail. Its face is masked in dark blue, and it has a short, conical beak.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spiky blue crest, symmetrical wings, white underbelly, and dark face mask.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered blue wings, spiky crest, and the red spiky tail cluster.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the wide wingspan, red spiky tail, and the blue back and head.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the blue wings, spiky crest, and red tail cluster.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid blue upperparts with a white underbelly and a dark face mask; spiky crest and red spiky tail cluster
